modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Partly cloudy with mostly sunny conditions. Light winds expected throughout the day.

modules.title: Fire Danger Rating
modules.summary: Moderate fire danger today. Campfires and solid-fuel BBQs are permitted with mandatory safety requirements.
bullet_points: 3-meter clearance of all flammable material required
Adult must be in attendance at all times
Reliable water supply must be on hand

modules.title: Current Burning Period
modules.summary: Restricted Burning Period (Autumn) for the Shire of Augusta Margaret River ends at midnight on Sunday 3 May 2026. A Permit to Burn is required during this period.
bullet_points: Current period ends: Sunday 3 May 2026 at midnight
Permit to Burn required for restricted burning periods
Contact your local Fire Control Officer (FCO) or Shire Rangers before lighting up
Dates subject to change due to variable weather conditions

modules.title: Bin Collection Schedule
modules.summary: Week of 18 May 2026: Green (FOGO) and Landfill (Red) bins are due for collection.
bullet_points: Red (Landfill) bin: Out this week (odd week from 30 June 2025 anchor)
